---
title: "\'Thorns and Roses in a Homely Life\'"
---

## \'Thorns and Roses in a Homely Life\'

**Author:** Ann Maria Carter Smith
**Date:** 1856
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> 12 (December 1856), 414-64.

### Notes

Reprinted in <i>Lucy and Christian Wainwright and other stories</i> (1863) with that story, ‘Bygone Days’, ‘A Household Record’, ‘The Two Beauties’, ‘Will No One do Likewise?’ and ‘The Lost are Found’.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
